media:group.media:title: 【Crab Champions】Bday battle with Milky Queen【#Coyote / #KemoV】
media:group.media:description:
Let's celebrate Milky's bday with some crab shooting battles!
Milky Queen: https://twitter.com/milkyqueen_idol
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Opening screen Illustrator/animator: ツクウルフル様 (@kemopuffin) ▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Hello Coyo! おはコヨー！It’s Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but I’m sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~🐾🐾🐾🐾
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Social】🐺 https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Rules】🐺 🌟Please refrain from arguments in the chat 🌟No slandering or malicious comments 🌟Be kind and respect each other; let’s keep it a safe and friendly space! 🌟If you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments 🌟Please refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream 🌟Please do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts 🌟Please do not bring up other streamers’ names unless I talk about them and vice versa 🌟Please do not share unauthorized URLs 🌟Please refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these rules, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【KemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber Project】🐺 https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Tags】🐺 Live: #howlcast Art: #coyoart Memes: #coyomeme Fan Name: Coyodachi Oshi Mark: 🐺🐾 Group: #KemoV/#けもV Mascot: #coyopotato General: #CoyoteKemoV
#ENvtuber
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
For Inquiries → info@kemono-friends.jp

entry.title: 【Gang Beasts】Fighting it out with Shizukou, Reiny, Luca!【#Coyote / #KemoV】

media:group.media:title: 【Gang Beasts】Fighting it out with Shizukou, Reiny, Luca!【#Coyote / #KemoV】

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but I’m sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~🐾🐾🐾🐾

entry.title: 【TEKKEN 8】Tekken Tuesday with Open Sessions and Tourney!【#Coyote / #KemoV】#tekken #鉄拳8

media:group.media:title: 【TEKKEN 8】Tekken Tuesday with Open Sessions and Tourney!【#Coyote / #KemoV】#tekken #鉄拳8
media:group.media:description:
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions! We are still figuring out how to run our weekly sessions in Tekken 8.
Anyone can join. Just follow the rules!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKEN™8 & ©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. ▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Opening screen Illustrator/animator: ツクウルフル様 (@kemopuffin) ▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Hello Coyo! おはコヨー！It’s Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but I’m sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~🐾🐾🐾🐾
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Social】🐺 https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Rules】🐺 🌟Please refrain from arguments in the chat 🌟No slandering or malicious comments 🌟Be kind and respect each other; let’s keep it a safe and friendly space! 🌟If you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments 🌟Please refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream 🌟Please do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts 🌟Please do not bring up other streamers’ names unless I talk about them and vice versa 🌟Please do not share unauthorized URLs 🌟Please refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【KemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber Project】🐺 https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Tags】🐺 Live: #howlcast Art: #coyoart Memes: #coyomeme Fan Name: Coyodachi Oshi Mark: 🐺🐾 Group: #KemoV/#けもV Mascot: #coyopotato General: #CoyoteKemoV

media:group.media:title: 【TEKKEN 8】Tekken Tuesday OPEN SESSIONS!【#Coyote / #KemoV】#tekken #鉄拳8
media:group.media:description:
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions! We are still figuring out how to run our weekly sessions in Tekken 8.
Anyone can join. Just follow the rules!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKEN™8 & ©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. ▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Opening screen Illustrator/animator: ツクウルフル様 (@kemopuffin) ▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Hello Coyo! おはコヨー！It’s Coyo here!

I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~🐾🐾🐾🐾

media:group.media:title: 【TEKKEN 8】Valentine's Day Customizations and Sessions!【#Coyote / #KemoV】#tekken #鉄拳8
media:group.media:description:
Let's Celebrate Valentine's Day together! Show our love for our favorite characters and show off your custom Valentine's themed custom outfits!
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKEN™8 & ©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. ▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Opening screen Illustrator/animator: ツクウルフル様 (@kemopuffin) ▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Hello Coyo! おはコヨー！It’s Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but I’m sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~🐾🐾🐾🐾
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Social】🐺 https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Rules】🐺 🌟Please refrain from arguments in the chat 🌟No slandering or malicious comments 🌟Be kind and respect each other; let’s keep it a safe and friendly space! 🌟If you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments 🌟Please refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream 🌟Please do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts 🌟Please do not bring up other streamers’ names unless I talk about them and vice versa 🌟Please do not share unauthorized URLs 🌟Please refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!

entry.title: 【TEKKEN 8】Online Rank - Can we get to Yellows?【#Coyote / #KemoV】#tekken #鉄拳8

media:group.media:title: 【TEKKEN 8】Online Rank - Can we get to Yellows?【#Coyote / #KemoV】#tekken #鉄拳8
media:group.media:description:
TEKKEN™8 & ©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. ▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Opening screen Illustrator/animator: ツクウルフル様 (@kemopuffin) ▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Hello Coyo! おはコヨー！It’s Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but I’m sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~🐾🐾🐾🐾
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Social】🐺 https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Rules】🐺 🌟Please refrain from arguments in the chat 🌟No slandering or malicious comments 🌟Be kind and respect each other; let’s keep it a safe and friendly space! 🌟If you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments 🌟Please refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream 🌟Please do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts 🌟Please do not bring up other streamers’ names unless I talk about them and vice versa 🌟Please do not share unauthorized URLs 🌟Please refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△

media:group.media:title: 【TEKKEN 7】Thank You Tekken 7 Party【#Coyote / #KemoV】#tekken #鉄拳7
media:group.media:description:
Thank you Tekken 7! Time to celebrate our time with Tekken 7 before 8 comes out! | There will be fun sessions and tourneys! Come join, everyone is invited as long as the rules below are followed~
How to join sessions 1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer) 2. ONLY fight against me (coyo), and do not accept matches against viewers (this is so I can fight everyone in session and have time for tourney later) 3. 1 match per person - * after you finish your match with me, please leave the session lobby. (this is so others can find the lobby and more slots open up for others to join in too) 4. In sessions, internet connection does not matter. Just come to have fun - we can accept lag for our casual sessions!
How to join Tourneys: 1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer) 2. First come, first serve basis 3. We may have special tourneys with rules and will explain it before the tourney starts (sometimes we do random character selection tourneys, P2 side only tourneys, Leo only tourneys, etc) 4. We do take internet connection into account for tourneys. It will depend on your connection with me (coyo).
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Opening screen Illustrator/animator: ツクウルフル様 (@kemopuffin) ▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Hello Coyo! おはコヨー！It’s Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but I’m sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~🐾🐾🐾🐾
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Social】🐺 https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Rules】🐺 🌟Please refrain from arguments in the chat 🌟No slandering or malicious comments 🌟Be kind and respect each other; let’s keep it a safe and friendly space! 🌟If you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments 🌟Please refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream 🌟Please do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts 🌟Please do not bring up other streamers’ names unless I talk about them and vice versa 🌟Please do not share unauthorized URLs 🌟Please refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!

entry.title: 【TEKKEN TUESDAY】Yoshimitsu & Eddy Tekken Reactions and online play【#Coyote / #KemoV】#tekken #鉄拳7

media:group.media:title: 【TEKKEN TUESDAY】Yoshimitsu & Eddy Tekken Reactions and online play【#Coyote / #KemoV】#tekken #鉄拳7
media:group.media:description:
Thumbnail to be updated with Eddy and Yoshi! Will watch the trailer for Yoshi and Eddy DLC reveal for Tekken 8 together and try to play them but in T7 (just few more days till 8 comes out!)
Feel free to join us in sessions and tourney! How to join sessions 1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer) 2. ONLY fight against me (coyo), and do not accept matches against viewers (this is so I can fight everyone in session and have time for tourney later) 3. 1 match per person - * after you finish your match with me, please leave the session lobby. (this is so others can find the lobby and more slots open up for others to join in too) 4. In sessions, internet connection does not matter. Just come to have fun - we can accept lag for our casual sessions!
How to join Tourneys: 1. Must type the password "awoo" in the ingame chat (so we know you are a viewer) 2. First come, first serve basis 3. We may have special tourneys with rules and will explain it before the tourney starts (sometimes we do random character selection tourneys, P2 side only tourneys, Leo only tourneys, etc) 4. We do take internet connection into account for tourneys. It will depend on your connection with me (coyo).
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Opening screen Illustrator/animator: ツクウルフル様 (@kemopuffin) ▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△ Hello Coyo! おはコヨー！It’s Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but I’m sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~🐾🐾🐾🐾
▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△▼△
🐺【Social】🐺 https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
